name: Nami, Headstrong
text:
You may pay :rb_rune_calm: as an additional cost to play me.
When you play me, if you paid the additional cost, [Stun] an enemy unit. (It doesn't deal combat damage this turn.)
When I hold, the next time you play a unit this turn, ready it and [Buff] it.
